calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Uninsured Motorist Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARTIN H. SCHEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-956-1300 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. DAVID P. LANE OF THE LAW OFFICES OF GREGORY V. DeBERNARD, TEL. NO. 1-925-977-1400 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER MELANIE MARTIN'S Hearing On Petition To Compel Uninsured Motorist Arbitration and appoint Neutral Arbitrator is granted. The court appoints Nancy Hersh as the arbitrator. Petitioner's request for costs is denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

Partial Joinder In Petition To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arditration And Appoint Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARTIN H. SCHEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-956-1300 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. DAVID P. LANE OF THE LAW OFFICES OF GREGORY V. DeBERNARD, TEL. NO. 1-925-977-1400 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION'S Partial Joinder In Petition To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arbitration And Appoint Neutral Arbitrator is granted. The court appoints Nancy Hersh as the arbitrator. Petitioner's request for costs is denied. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
